---
title: "Dorsum_environment"
author: "Ore, MJ."
date: "2025-03-11"
output: rmarkdown::github_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r prep data, echo = FALSE}

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(viridis)

here::i_am("R_scripts/Color_correlations.Rmd")


avg_img <- read.csv(here("data/BTBW_whole_specimen_Image_Analysis_measurements_allpop_avgimg_wide.csv"))

## select only brightness for ASY males
asy <- avg_img %>% 
  filter(Age == "ASY")


# combine w environment data  
env <- read.table(here("data/Env_by_individual_specimen_samples.txt"), header = T)

lum_env <- merge(asy, env) 

```

## Does location predict color ? 

```{r lat vs dorsum, echo = F}

#perform linear regression
z <- lm(PC1_d~lat, data = asy, na.action = na.exclude)
sum_z <- summary(z)

# Extract the r^2 and p-value
r2adj <- sum_z$adj.r.squared
p_value <- sum_z$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# Format the text to include rho and p-value, ready to be used in annotations
text_annotation <- bquote("Adjusted R"^2 ~ ": " ~ .(sprintf("%.2f", r2adj)) ~ ", p-value: " ~ .(sprintf("%.3f", p_value)))


ggplot(data = asy, aes(x = lat, y = PC1_d)) + 
  geom_point(width = 0.6, position = position_dodge(width = 0.7)) +
  labs(x = "Latitude", y = "Luminance (brightness)") +
  geom_smooth(aes(x = lat, y = PC1_d), method = "lm", col = "black")+
  theme_classic() +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = text_annotation, 
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1, size = 5, color = "blue")+
  theme(
    aspect.ratio = 0.75,
    text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )

```

# Build model for env-dorsum correlation

```{r lmm pheno-env, echo = F}

library(lmerTest)
library(MASS)
library(MuMIn)
library(performance)
library(sjPlot)


z <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_d ~ bio_10 + bio_18 + srtm + qscat + ndvi_M + lat + 
                      (1|Year) + (1|prepartor) + (1|pop),
                    data = lum_env, na.action = "na.omit")


check_model(z)
summary(z)
tab_model(z)


#dredge(z)

#removing random factors and bio8 bc I don't trust it
norand <- lum_env %>% 
  dplyr::select(PC1_d, bio_10, bio_18, srtm, qscat, ndvi_M, lat) %>% 
  na.omit()
# stepwise model selection
full <- lm(PC1_d ~., data = norand) 

#using dredge 
z <- dredge(full, rank = "AICc")
print(z)                                  # Model selection table
print(z[z$delta < 5])                     # Tabulate only models with AIC difference < 5
Weights(z)                                # AIC weights all models
Weights(z[z$delta < 5])                   # Include only models with AIC difference < 5
get.models(z, subset=delta<5)             # Extract the models having AIC difference < 5
get.models(z, subset = 1)[[1]]            # Extract single best model (yields lm object)

t <- lm(get.models(z, subset = 1)[[1]], data = norand) # Fit best model
summary(model.avg(t, subset = delta < 2))              # model averaging




z <- stepAIC(z, direction="both")

summary(z)
plot(z)
anova(z)
logLik(z) # include df
AIC(z)    # AIC score


```

```{r random forest pheno-env, echo = F}

library(randomForest)

norand <- lum_env %>% 
  dplyr::select(PC1_d, PPT_br, RH_br, Tave_br, Tmin_br, Tmax_br, Rad_br, srtm, qscat, ndvi_M, lat) %>% 
  na.omit()

model <- PC1_d ~ PPT_br + RH_br + Tave_br + Tmin_br + Tmax_br + Rad_br + srtm + qscat + ndvi_M + lat

rf1 <- randomForest(model, data = norand,
              ntreeTry=500,
               mtryStart=4, 
               stepFactor=1.5,
               improve=0.01,
               trace=FALSE #don't show real-time progress
               )
which.min(rf1$mse)
sqrt(rf1$mse[which.min(rf1$mse)])
plot(rf1)
importance(rf1)
varImpPlot(rf1)


```

## Generalized Additive Model

```{r GAM, echo = F}

library(mgcv)
library(itsadug)

lum_sel <-  lum_env %>% 
  dplyr::select(PC1_d, PPT_br, RH_br, Tave_br, Tmin_br, Tmax_br, 
                Rad_br, srtm, qscat, ndvi_M, lat, lon, Year, prepartor) %>% 
  na.omit()


# test for linear relationship

env <- c("PPT_br", "RH_br", "Tave_br", "Tmin_br", "Tmax_br", "Rad_br", "srtm", 
         "qscat", "ndvi_M", "lat", "lon", "Year")

for (i in 1:length(env)) {
  envvar <- env[i]
  linear_model <- gam(PC1_d ~ lum_sel %>% pull(envvar), data = lum_sel)
  smooth_model <- gam(PC1_d ~ lum_sel %>% pull(envvar), data = lum_sel)
  aicsc <- AIC(linear_model, smooth_model)
  aicsc$env <- rep(envvar, nrow(aicsc))
  aicsc$delaic <- aicsc$AIC - min(aicsc$AIC)
  print(aicsc)
}
## all perform equally well as linear or smoothed... 

linear_model_s1 <- gam(PC1_d ~ Tave_br, data = lum_sel)
smooth_model_s1 <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(Tave_br), data = lum_sel)

ggplot(lum_sel, aes(x = Tave_br, y = PC1_d)) + geom_point() +
    geom_line(colour = "red", size = 1.2, aes(y = fitted(linear_model_s1))) +
    geom_line(colour = "blue", size = 1.2, aes(y = fitted(smooth_model_s1))) +
    theme_bw()

mod2dY <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat, by = Year),
             data = lum_sel, method = "REML")
te <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat) + Tave_br + ti(lat, Tave_br) + s(srtm) + Year, 
             data = lum_sel, method = "REML")
tpe <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat) + s(Tave_br)+ ti(Tave_br, lat) + s(PPT_br) + s(srtm) ,
             data = lum_sel, method = "REML")
tpemny <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat) + s(Tave_br) + s(PPT_br) +
                s(RH_br) + s(Rad_br) + s(qscat) + s(ndvi_M) + s(srtm),
             data = lum_sel, method = "REML")
thre <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat) + s(Tave_br) + s(RH_br) + s(Rad_br) + s(srtm) ,
             data = lum_sel, method = "REML")
hr <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat) + s(RH_br) + s(Rad_br),
             data = lum_sel, method = "REML")


aicsc <- AIC(mod2dY, te,tpe,tpemny, thre, hr)
aicsc$delaic <- aicsc$AIC - min(aicsc$AIC)
aicsc

gam.check(model)
coef(model)
summary(model)

plot_smooth(model)

vis.gam(x = te, view = c("lat", "srtm"), plot.type = "persp", se =2)
```

```{r plot}

# combine w environment data  
env <- read.table(here("data/Env_by_individual_specimen_samples.txt"), header = T)

lum_env <- merge(asy, env)

ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = bio_10, y = PC1_d, color = lat))+
  geom_point(size =4)+
  labs(x = "Mean Temperature of Warmest Quarter", y = "PC1 Dorsum")+
  geom_line(aes(y = fitted(te)), colour = "red", size = 1.2)
  theme_classic()

z <- lm(PC1_d~ bio_10, data = lum_env)
summary(z)

ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = lat, y = bio_10, color = PC1_d))+
  geom_point(size=4, position = "jitter")+
  labs(x = "Latitude", y = "Mean Temperature of Warmest Quarter")+
  theme_classic()

ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = PC1_d, y = lat, color = bio_10))+
  geom_point(size=4, position = "jitter")+
  labs(x = "Dorsum PC1", y = "Latitude")+
  theme_classic()

ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = ndvi_M, y = PC1_d, color = lat))+
  geom_point(size =4)+
  labs(x = "Max NDVI", y = "Dorsum brightness")+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = ndvi_M, y = PC1_d), method = "lm", col = "black")+  
  theme_classic()

z <- lm(PC1_d~ ndvi_M, data = lum_env)
summary(z)

ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = bio_18, y = PC1_d, color = lat))+
  geom_point(size =4)+
  labs(x = "Precip of Warmest Quarter", y = "Dorsum brightness")+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = bio_18, y = PC1_d), method = "lm", col = "black")+  
  theme_classic()

z <- lm(PC1_d~ bio_18, data = lum_env)
summary(z)

ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = qscat, y = PC1_d, color = lat))+
  geom_point(size =4)+
  labs(x = "Surface Moisture", y = "Dorsum brightness")+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = qscat, y = PC1_d), method = "lm", col = "black")+  
  theme_classic()

z <- lm(PC1_d~ qscat, data = lum_env, na.action = "na.omit")
summary(z)

ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = srtm, y = PC1_d, color = lat))+
  geom_point(size =4)+
  labs(x = "Elevation", y = "Dorsum brightness")+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = srtm, y = PC1_d), method = "lm", col = "black")+  
  theme_classic()

z <- lm(PC1_d~ srtm, data = lum_env)
summary(z)


```

# morphometric data
```{r pca morpho}

morpho <- lum_env %>% 
  dplyr::select(ID, weight.g, wing.R.mm, tail.mm, bill.depth.mm, 
                bill.culmen.mm, bill.nares.mm, bill.width.mm, Tarsometatarsus) 
morphoIDs <- morpho$ID
morpho <- morpho[,-1]
morphopca <- prcomp( ~ ., data = morpho, , na.action = na.exclude, scale.=T)

biplot(morphopca, cex = 0.5, las = 1) 

pcscores <- data.frame(ID = morphoIDs, 
                       PC1 = morphopca$x[,1], PC2 = morphopca$x[,2], 
                  PC3 = morphopca$x[,3], PC4 = morphopca$x[,4])

lum_pc <- merge(lum_env, pcscores, all = T)

ggplot(data = lum_pc, aes(x = lat, y = PC2))+
  geom_point()+
  theme_classic()

ggplot(data = lum_pc, aes(x = bio_10, y = PC1, color = lat))+
  geom_point()+
  theme_classic()

ggplot(data = lum_pc, aes(x = srtm, y = PC2, color = lat))+
  geom_point()+
  theme_classic()

ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = wing.spot.L.mm, y = area_mm2_w ))+
  geom_point()+
  theme_classic()

cor.test(x=lum_env$wing.spot.L.mm, y=lum_env$area_mm2_w, method = "pearson")

```
